title: Methods and systems for forming stellarator coils and superconducting tapes
assignee: Type One Energy Group Inc
status_note: Pending as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: stellarator coil forming: tapered helical cable, bobbin layer dispensing, spine stabilization
indep_claim_gist: Forming stellarator coils addressing tape shrinkage: cable bent into tapered helical configurations, stabilization structures with thin spine and struts for HTS tapes, independent bobbins dispensing layers.
notes: Pending PCT, claims can still grow; the contractually foreclosed cable source (U-003) now filing manufacturing methods; expiry if granted ~2044. Claim-depth read.

title: Plates for non-planar magnetic field coils in stellarators (title as rendered in fetch: 'Plates for Non-Planar Magnetic Field Coils in Stars')
assignee: Proxima Fusion GmbH
status_note: Pending as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: non-planar plates with reorienting recesses guiding HTS cable along winding path
indep_claim_gist: Stellarator comprising non-planar coil plates with recesses of non-circular cross-section whose orientation changes continuously along the winding path, enabling precise HTS cable alignment; method includes provision, alignment, fixing steps.
notes: Fences the plate-channel (machined groove) route to non-planar coils; W7-X-lineage spin-out; serves U-003 analysis. Claim-depth read.

title: Superconducting flat tape cable magnet
assignee: Makoto Takayasu (US DOE confirmatory license noted 2025)
status_note: Active as displayed on GP; expires ~2033-12-11; indicative
claim_theme: stacked-tape twist-wind (STTW) method for 3D/saddle HTS coil geometries
indep_claim_gist: Coil fabrication using stacked flat-tape superconductor cable wound around support surfaces by bending at corners without twisting and twisting about the longitudinal axis along substantially straight portions.
notes: Method claims read on twist-managed 3D tape-stack winding practice until ~2033; citation-chase hub (led to MIT/CFS and Type One docs). CPC not captured in fetch view. Claim-depth read.

title: Non-planar HTS coils and manufacturing techniques
assignee: Massachusetts Institute of Technology; Commonwealth Fusion Systems LLC
status_note: Ceased as displayed on GP; national-phase members not located this run - verify; indicative
claim_theme: former-channel cable with twist pitch below local bend radius; non-planar manufacturing
indep_claim_gist: HTS cable comprising former with channels holding tape stacks, both twisted along cable length with twist pitch smaller than the bend radius at any location; spec adds two-step twist with 600C anneal.
notes: Displayed Ceased but disclosure is strong prior art against any independent filing on twist-managed non-planar cable winding; VIPER lineage; U-003 nearest art. Claim-depth read.

title: HTS field coils
assignee: Tokamak Energy Ltd
status_note: Granted (CN115485868B), active as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: wind HTS tapes then machine axial tape edges to set turn-to-turn resistance
indep_claim_gist: Manufacturing HTS field coils by winding HTS tapes around an axis, then removing material from axial edges of the tapes to reduce axial extent and control electrical resistance between windings.
notes: TE partial-insulation-by-machining granted in CN; blocks PI-edge-trimming as a cell process step in CN; risk rises to high if that PI route is adopted. Claim-depth read.

title: Inter-layer transition forming machine for winding of large-sized superconducting coils
assignee: Hefei Institutes of Physical Science, Chinese Academy of Sciences
status_note: Active as displayed on GP; expires ~2041-09-26; indicative
claim_theme: hydraulic inter-layer transition forming machine for large SC coil winding
indep_claim_gist: Machine forming inter-layer transitions with perpendicular vertical and horizontal forming mechanisms using double-acting hydraulic cylinders, positive/negative-thread wedge clamping, and reference-line positioning of the conductor bend.
notes: Playbook seed re-fetched this run; exactly P05 'inter-layer transition forming' scope; CN sibling CN108461277B (also fetched) shows priority 2018-02-01, active to ~2038 - flag date discrepancy at merge; specific mechanism suggests design-around space (not a legal conclusion). Claim-depth read.

title: Planar coil stellarator
assignee: Princeton University (licensed base of Thea Energy architecture)
status_note: Active as displayed on GP; expires ~2043-03-10; indicative
claim_theme: stellarator from planar shaping-coil arrays plus planar encircling coils
indep_claim_gist: Stellarator with field-shaping units carrying planar shaping coils on structural mounts plus planar encircling coils; shaping coils individually do not encircle the plasma axis, collectively do; no coil interlocking.
notes: Device-configuration claims only - no manufacturing/winding claims located in family (charter mandate checked); blocks the planar-array architecture route, not winding machinery; EP/WO siblings surfaced in search but not fetched - resolve at merge. Claim-depth read.

title: Stellarator with pre-adjusted layered superconductor material
assignee: Proxima Fusion GmbH
status_note: Pending as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: non-planar coil cable with orientation change between inner and outer sections
indep_claim_gist: Stellarator with non-planar coil cable whose inner section of superconductor layers has a first orientation and outer section a second, the first changing relative to the second along the cable length.
notes: Pairs with EP4672267A1 to fence cable-orientation management for non-planar winding; priority app PCT/EP2025/067901 referenced on page. Claim-depth read.

title: Wound HTS magnet coils
assignee: Tokamak Energy Ltd
status_note: Active as displayed on GP; anticipated expiration 2039-01-30; indicative
claim_theme: HTS coil wound on former with shunt cables between turns for current sharing
notes: Coil-architecture claim (spiral cable + inter-turn HTS shunts) rather than machinery; manufacturing description covers winding cable around former; planar pancake focus, no non-planar coverage per fetched text.

title: Winding method for HTS coil
assignee: Tokamak Energy Ltd
status_note: Ceased as displayed on GP; national-phase status not located this run - verify; indicative
claim_theme: shingle-overlap laying of short HTS tapes with co-wound substrate separator
notes: Coil from many short overlapping tapes (>=50% overlap, offset ends) laid by automated bidirectional apparatus; spec acknowledges non-planar spool-motion complexity but claims planar embodiment; CPC not captured in fetch view.

title: Linear media handling systems and devices for production using the same
title_zh: 线性介质处理系统和使用其进行生产的装置
assignee: Infinite Physics LLC (orig.); Electric Chaos LLC (current)
status_note: Active as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: closed-loop direct tension control winding of delicate superconducting media
notes: US-origin CN grant: dual-spool speed feedback, no reverse bends, angular-offset winding beyond pure planar; broadest tension-control machine claims found in CN; confirms B65H54/22+B65H59/385 entry points; U-002 adjacent.

title: Continuous winding magnets using thin film conductors without resistive joints
assignee: UChicago Argonne LLC
status_note: Active as displayed on GP; expires ~2037-03-04; indicative
claim_theme: jointless continuous HTS tape winding into grooved core with turnaround pins
notes: Undulator geometry: grooved ferromagnetic core, alternating-polarity coil stacks wound from one continuous tape; nearest process analog to planar-array (Thea-route) batch manufacturing - WH-P05-5 nearest art.

title: Saddle-shaped coil winding using superconductors, and method for the production thereof
assignee: Siemens AG
status_note: Expired - Fee Related as displayed on GP (expired 2022-06-22) - verify before reliance; indicative
claim_theme: saddle coil re-formed from flat racetrack winding of strip HTS conductor
notes: Foundational wind-flat-then-form route with unchanged circumferential length and graded apex inclination; KR/RU/CN family; displays lapsed - anchor of the expiry horizon; H01F41/071 confirmed as special-form winding code.

title: Winding former for a saddle coil winding
assignee: Zenergy Power GmbH
status_note: Expired - Fee Related as displayed on GP (2015-11-15) - verify before reliance; indicative
claim_theme: twisted-bearing-surface former plates for HTS saddle winding on cylinder
notes: Former/mandrel (H01F41/098-theme) tooling art with CN sibling; displays lapsed after 8 years - evidence the 2005-2012 EU saddle-tooling stratum was abandoned commercially.

title: Robotic coil winding system
assignee: NECOA Inc
status_note: Expired - Fee Related as displayed on GP; term over; indicative
claim_theme: robot arm transfers bobbins among winding, solder, test stations under central control
notes: Oldest robotic-cell art found: robot is a material handler between stations, not a winding-trajectory tool - delimits WH-P05-1; H01F41/09 (multi-work-holder machines) code observed.

title: Needle winding machine, particularly for winding poles arranged inside a cylindrical surface
assignee: Marsilli & Co. S.p.A.
status_note: Granted as US10348171B2 (2019-07-09), active as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: needle winder with axially movable, rotatable, radially translatable wire-guide tube
notes: E-mobility OEM estate representative (charter mandate): fetched claim language recites copper wire and wire-guiding tube - does not read on band/tape conductors, but generic head kinematics remain prior art against machine claims; Aumann search hits were wire-bobbin devices (not fetched).

title: Design method to prevent deformation of stellarator three-dimensional modular coils under electromagnetic force
title_zh: 防止仿星器三维模块化线圈因受电磁力而变形的设计方法
assignee: Southwest Jiaotong University 西南交通大学
status_note: Active as displayed on GP; anticipated expiration 2042-04-11; indicative
claim_theme: segment-wise EM-force integration and support-box placement for 3D modular coils
notes: CFQS-lineage design-method claim, no winding/manufacturing steps - evidence CN stellarator art is design-side, machinery-side empty (WH-P05-6).

title: High-temperature superconductor double-pancake coil winding machine
title_zh: 一种高温超导双饼线圈绕线机
assignee: Electric Power Research Institute of Guangdong Power Grid Co Ltd
status_note: Granted, active as displayed on GP (event 2024-02-13); indicative
claim_theme: dual-tape constant-tension double-pancake winder with pressure-sensor feedback
notes: Representative active CN planar DP winder: two tension mechanisms + magnetic-controller speed regulation + length encoder; no QC/traceability/non-planar elements - nearest CN art for WH-P05-2.

title: Intelligent superconducting magnet production device
title_zh: 一种超导磁体智能生产装置
assignee: Henan University of Urban Construction (orig.); Shanghai Newrich Energy Technology Co., Ltd. (current)
status_note: Granted 2023-01-24, active as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: constant-tension payoff with adaptive pressing against inner-coil shrinkage
notes: Closest CN title to an 'intelligent cell': fetched claims are mechanical (adaptive transmission + pressing structure) with no process control, QC, traceability, or robot elements - key bounded-absence anchor for U-002/WH-P05-2.

title: Device for winding superconducting coil
title_zh: 一种绕制超导线圈的装置
assignee: Tsinghua University; Hangzhou Biological Medicine Science and Technology Pioneer Park Co Ltd
status_note: Expired - Fee Related as displayed on GP (terminated 2019-01-08) - verify before reliance; indicative
claim_theme: constant-tension low-speed SC winding: CVT drive, tension sensor, payoff unit
notes: Seed of the CN SC-winder citation cluster (its Cited-By indexes CN winder art incl. the HFIPS transition machine and the DP winder families); lapsed 2019.

title: R bending mold for bending high-strength superconducting conductor
title_zh: 弯曲高强度超导体的R弯曲模具
assignee: Hefei Keye Electricity Physics Equipment Manufacturing Co Ltd
status_note: Utility model withdrawn after issue as displayed on GP (abandoned 2015-08-26); 10y UM term would end 2022; indicative
claim_theme: hydraulic servo R-bend die for high-strength SC conductor on winding platform
notes: ASIPP-ecosystem (Hefei Keye) CICC bend-forming tooling UM - the machine class 曦合超导 later productized; UM capture per playbook; U-006 context.

title: Fully automatic toroidal (ring) winding machine
assignee: Zhongshan Guoquan Electronic Equipments Co Ltd
status_note: Utility model expired (fee) 2013-11-04 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: generic automatic toroid winder: feed, transmission, winding through closed ring
notes: Generic (non-SC) toroidal winder UM - baseline for the crowded conventional-machinery layer beneath P05; GP fetch showed concept codes only, CPC not captured.
